scripts.dev:functions: npm run functions:build && firebase emulators:start --only functions --project organizr-skip
scripts.dev:firebase: concurrently -k -n functions,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:functions" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.openapi:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const file='functions/openapi.json';const read=()=>JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8'));const format=(value)=>JSON.stringify(value,null,2)+'\n';const spec=read();const fail=(message)=>{console.error(message);process.exit(1);};const inspect=(node,path=[])=>{if(!node||typeof node!=='object'){return;}if(Array.isArray(node)){node.forEach((item,index)=>inspect(item,path.concat(index)));return;}const pathText=path.join('.');if(path.length>=2&&path[path.length-2]==='content'&&typeof node.\$ref==='string'&&!('schema' in node)){fail('Invalid media type object at '+pathText+': wrap \$ref inside schema.');}for(const [key,value] of Object.entries(node)){inspect(value,path.concat(key));}};inspect(spec);if(format(spec)!==fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8')){fail('functions/openapi.json is not formatted canonically. Run npm run openapi:sync.');}console.log('OpenAPI spec is structurally consistent.');"
scripts.functions:build: npm run openapi:sync && npm --prefix functions run build
scripts.firebase:build: npm run build && npm run functions:build
